overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rolling prairie grassland under a clear blue sky. The character encounters two horseback riders approaching from the distance and stops to observe them pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through rolling grassland, heading toward distant hills

entered.detail: winding brown dirt path cutting through the tall green grass
expansive prairie with tall green grass and gentle rolling hills
expansive prairie with tall green grass and gentle rolling hills
clusters of green shrubs and small vegetation along the trail edge
snow-capped mountain range visible on the horizon under blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a winding dirt trail through expansive prairie grassland. The landscape features rolling green hills under a clear blue sky with scattered clouds, with distant snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon. Green shrubs line the right side of the path as the character moves forward through the open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with approaching horseback riders

events.description: character stops walking and turns to the left to face the approaching riders
two horseback riders become clearly visible approaching from the distance along the trail

agents.ego_description: stands still and turns to watch two riders on horseback approaching from the distance along the trail

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback approaching along the dirt trail, riding side by side

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and turns to observe two horseback riders approaching from the distance along the trail. The riders draw closer while the character remains stationary, watching them pass by in the open grassland. The surrounding prairie landscape remains consistent with green rolling hills and distant mountains under the clear midday sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding prairie trail that shifts from a steady journey through the wilderness to a stationary observation of passing travelers. It begins with the character walking forward through expansive green rolling hills and shrubs under a clear blue sky, with snow-capped mountains framing the distant horizon. As the character continues along the dirt path, the forward momentum ceases and the camera pivots to face the approaching trail. The scene then settles into a stationary perspective as two horseback riders emerge from the distance and draw closer through the open grassland. Finally, the camera remains still, watching the riders pass by against the backdrop of the midday landscape.
